title: Harden Rust RPL boundary and DODAG state handling
description: Fix review findings in rust/lichen-rpl: reject finite candidates whose path cost saturates to INFINITE_RANK, and prevent an unjoined node from adopting a same-version foreign DODAG without explicit identity handling. Add independent regression tests.
close_reason: Implemented RPL rank saturation and same-version foreign DODAG guards; tests, clippy, and fmt pass.
